report_date_basis: Cowork dashboard report date follows receipt/publication date; underlying business data represents the prior day.
source: Public ESPN RSS + Yahoo Sports RSS feeds

source_detail.yahoo_news_sports: excluded for v0.2 because quick validation showed lower relevance and higher safety/noise risk than Yahoo Sports RSS.

items.headline: Dodgers' Ohtani will be available against Yankees
items.detail: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts says Shohei Ohtani will "be in the lineup" for this weekend's series against the Yankees in the Bronx after having fluid drained from his left knee.
items.relevance_reason: ESPN precision source; matches ohtani, yankees, dodgers

items.headline: Walker hopes Derby win stirs Black kids to play
items.detail: Cardinals outfielder Jordan Walker wants to be a role model, and he hopes his victory in the Home Run Derby inspires more Black kids to play baseball.

items.headline: AL 3B Caminero hit by pitch, exits in 3rd inning
items.detail: In the third inning of Tuesday's All-Star Game, Cardinals reliever Riley O'Brien hit Rays third baseman Junior Caminero on the left hand with a 97.6 mph sinker. Though the 23-year-old star went right into the AL clubhouse, X-rays came back negative.
items.relevance_reason: ESPN precision source; matches all-star, card

items.headline: Messi, Argentina stun England late to reach final
items.detail: Argentina sealed a dramatic semifinal comeback against England at Mercedes-Benz Stadium with two goals in the final five minutes to clinch a 2-1 win and book a World Cup final clash with Spain on Sunday.

items.headline: Kane: 'Too soon' to decide if '26 WC was my last
items.detail: Harry Kane said it's too soon to make a call on whether this is his last World Cup with England, adding that Tuesday's 2-1 World Cup semifinal loss to Argentina was a similar story to other past near-misses.

items.headline: Messi: Win over England meant most to our fans
